APIError.description: APIError is an api error with a message

Comment.description: Comment represents a comment on a commit or issue

created_at.description: The time of the comment's creation

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the comment

issue_url.description: The HTML URL of the issue if the comment is posted on an issue, else empty string

original_author.description: The original author that posted the comment if it was not posted locally, else empty string

original_author_id.description: The ID of the original author that posted the comment if it was not posted locally, else 0

pull_request_url.description: The HTML URL of the pull request if the comment is posted on a pull request, else empty string

updated_at.description: The time of the comment's update

CreateIssueCommentOption.description: CreateIssueCommentOption options for creating a comment on an issue

updated_at.description: The time of the comment's update, needs admin or repository owner permission

CreateIssueOption.description: CreateIssueOption options to create one issue

CreateLabelOption.description: CreateLabelOption options for creating a label

CreateMilestoneOption.description: CreateMilestoneOption options for creating a milestone

CreateReleaseOption.description: CreateReleaseOption options when creating a release

auto_init.description: Whether the repository should be auto-initialized?

default_branch.description: DefaultBranch of the repository (used when initializes and in template)

description.description: Description of the repository to create

name.description: Name of the repository to create

object_format_name.description: ObjectFormatName of the underlying git repository

readme.description: Readme of the repository to create

DeleteLabelsOption.description: DeleteLabelOption options for deleting a label

EditIssueOption.description: EditIssueOption options for editing an issue

EditLabelOption.description: EditLabelOption options for editing a label

EditMilestoneOption.description: EditMilestoneOption options for editing a milestone

EditReleaseOption.description: EditReleaseOption options when editing a release

EditRepoOption.description: EditRepoOption options when editing a repository's properties

allow_fast_forward_only_merge.description: either `true` to allow fast-forward-only merging pull requests, or `false` to prevent fast-forward-only merging.

allow_manual_merge.description: either `true` to allow mark pr as merged manually, or `false` to prevent it.

allow_merge_commits.description: either `true` to allow merging pull requests with a merge commit, or `false` to prevent merging pull requests with merge commits.

allow_rebase.description: either `true` to allow rebase-merging pull requests, or `false` to prevent rebase-merging.

allow_rebase_explicit.description: either `true` to allow rebase with explicit merge commits (--no-ff), or `false` to prevent rebase with explicit merge commits.

allow_rebase_update.description: either `true` to allow updating pull request branch by rebase, or `false` to prevent it.

allow_squash_merge.description: either `true` to allow squash-merging pull requests, or `false` to prevent squash-merging.

archived.description: set to `true` to archive this repository.

autodetect_manual_merge.description: either `true` to enable AutodetectManualMerge, or `false` to prevent it. Note: In some special cases, misjudgments can occur.

default_allow_maintainer_edit.description: set to `true` to allow edits from maintainers by default

default_branch.description: sets the default branch for this repository.

default_delete_branch_after_merge.description: set to `true` to delete pr branch after merge by default

default_merge_style.description: set to a merge style to be used by this repository: "merge", "rebase", "rebase-merge", "squash", "fast-forward-only", "manually-merged", or "rebase-update-only".

default_update_style.description: set to a update style to be used by this repository: "rebase" or "merge"

description.description: a short description of the repository.

enable_prune.description: enable prune - remove obsolete remote-tracking references when mirroring

globally_editable_wiki.description: set the globally editable state of the wiki

has_actions.description: either `true` to enable actions unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_issues.description: either `true` to enable issues for this repository or `false` to disable them.

has_packages.description: either `true` to enable packages unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_projects.description: either `true` to enable project unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_pull_requests.description: either `true` to allow pull requests, or `false` to prevent pull request.

has_releases.description: either `true` to enable releases unit, or `false` to disable them.

has_wiki.description: either `true` to enable the wiki for this repository or `false` to disable it.

ignore_whitespace_conflicts.description: either `true` to ignore whitespace for conflicts, or `false` to not ignore whitespace.

mirror_interval.description: set to a string like `8h30m0s` to set the mirror interval time

private.description:
either `true` to make the repository private or `false` to make it public.
Note: you will get a 422 error if the organization restricts changing repository visibility to organization
owners and a non-owner tries to change the value of private.

template.description: either `true` to make this repository a template or `false` to make it a normal repository

website.description: a URL with more information about the repository.

wiki_branch.description: sets the branch used for this repository's wiki.

ExternalTracker.description: ExternalTracker represents settings for external tracker

external_tracker_format.description: External Issue Tracker URL Format. Use the placeholders {user}, {repo} and {index} for the username, repository name and issue index.

external_tracker_regexp_pattern.description: External Issue Tracker issue regular expression

external_tracker_style.description: External Issue Tracker Number Format, either `numeric`, `alphanumeric`, or `regexp`

ExternalWiki.description: ExternalWiki represents setting for external wiki

InternalTracker.description: InternalTracker represents settings for internal tracker

allow_only_contributors_to_track_time.description: Let only contributors track time (Built-in issue tracker)

enable_issue_dependencies.description: Enable dependencies for issues and pull requests (Built-in issue tracker)

Issue.description: Issue represents an issue in a repository

labels.description:
Labels can be a list of integers representing label IDs
or a list of strings representing label names

Label.description: Label a label to an issue or a pr

Milestone.description: Milestone milestone is a collection of issues on one repository

Permission.description: Permission represents a set of permissions

PullRequestMeta.description: PullRequestMeta PR info if an issue is a PR

RepoTransfer.description: RepoTransfer represents a pending repo transfer

has_wiki_contents.description: have wiki pages ever been created

object_format_name.description: ObjectFormatName of the underlying git repository

SearchResults.description: SearchResults results of a successful search

TagArchiveDownloadCount.description: TagArchiveDownloadCount counts how many times a archive was downloaded

Team.description: Team represents a team in an organization

html_url.description: URL to the user's profile page

source_id.description: The ID of the user's Authentication Source

visibility.description: User visibility level option: public, limited, private

parameters.description: page number of results to return (1-based)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: name of the organization to get
parameters.name: org

parameters.description: Specifies the sorting method: mostissues, leastissues, or reversealphabetically.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.name: page

parameters.name: id

parameters.name: id

parameters.name: id

parameters.description: page number of results to return (1-based)
parameters.name: page

post.summary: Create a repository in an organization

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of label names. Fetch only issues that have any of these labels. Non existent labels are discarded.
parameters.name: labels

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of milestone names. Fetch only issues that have any of these milestones. Non existent milestones are discarded.
parameters.name: milestones

parameters.description: Repository ID to prioritize in the results
parameters.name: priority_repo_id

parameters.description: Only show issues updated after the given time (RFC 3339 format)
parameters.name: since

parameters.description: Only show issues updated before the given time (RFC 3339 format)
parameters.name: before

parameters.description: Filter issues or pulls assigned to the authenticated user
parameters.name: assigned

parameters.description: Filter issues or pulls created by the authenticated user
parameters.name: created

parameters.description: Filter issues or pulls mentioning the authenticated user
parameters.name: mentioned

parameters.description: Filter pull requests where the authenticated user's review was requested
parameters.name: review_requested

parameters.description: Filter pull requests reviewed by the authenticated user
parameters.name: reviewed

parameters.description: Filter by team (requires organization owner parameter)
parameters.name: team

parameters.description: Page number of results to return (1-based)
parameters.name: page

get.summary: Search for issues across the repositories that the user has access to

parameters.description: Limit search to repositories with keyword as topic
parameters.name: topic

parameters.description: include search of keyword within repository description
parameters.name: includeDesc

parameters.description: search only for repos that the user with the given id owns or contributes to
parameters.name: uid

parameters.description: repo owner to prioritize in the results
parameters.name: priority_owner_id

parameters.description: search only for repos that belong to the given team id
parameters.name: team_id

parameters.description: search only for repos that the user with the given id has starred
parameters.name: starredBy

parameters.description: include private repositories this user has access to (defaults to true)
parameters.name: private

parameters.description: show only public, private or all repositories (defaults to all)
parameters.name: is_private

parameters.description: include template repositories this user has access to (defaults to true)
parameters.name: template

parameters.description: show only archived, non-archived or all repositories (defaults to all)
parameters.name: archived

parameters.description: type of repository to search for. Supported values are "fork", "source", "mirror" and "collaborative"
parameters.name: mode

parameters.description: if `uid` is given, search only for repos that the user owns
parameters.name: exclusive

parameters.description: sort repos by attribute. Supported values are "alpha", "created", "updated", "size", "git_size", "lfs_size", "stars", "forks" and "id". Default is "alpha"
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: sort order, either "asc" (ascending) or "desc" (descending). Default is "asc", ignored if "sort" is not specified.
parameters.name: order

parameters.description: page number of results to return (1-based)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: owner of the repo to delete
parameters.name: owner

parameters.description: name of the repo to delete
parameters.name: repo

parameters.description: owner of the repo to edit
parameters.name: owner

parameters.description: name of the repo to edit
parameters.name: repo

parameters.description: Properties of a repo that you can edit
parameters.name: body

patch.summary: Edit a repository's properties. Only fields that are set will be changed.

parameters.description: page number of results to return (1-based)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: page size of results, default maximum page size is 50
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description:
Returns workflow tasks with the check run status or conclusion that is specified.
 For example, a conclusion can be success or a status can be in_progress.
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: whether issue is open or closed
parameters.name: state

parameters.description: comma separated list of labels. Fetch only issues that have any of this labels. Non existent labels are discarded
parameters.name: labels

parameters.description: filter by type (issues / pulls) if set
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: comma separated list of milestone names or ids. It uses names and fall back to ids. Fetch only issues that have any of this milestones. Non existent milestones are discarded
parameters.name: milestones

parameters.description: Only show items updated after the given time. This is a timestamp in RFC 3339 format
parameters.name: since

parameters.description: Only show items updated before the given time. This is a timestamp in RFC 3339 format
parameters.name: before

parameters.description: Only show items which were created by the given user
parameters.name: created_by

parameters.description: Only show items for which the given user is assigned
parameters.name: assigned_by

parameters.description: Only show items in which the given user was mentioned
parameters.name: mentioned_by

parameters.description: page number of results to return (1-based)
parameters.name: page

forbidden.description: APIForbiddenError is a forbidden error response

notFound.description: APINotFound is a not found error response
